summary: Plan mode only. Classified the five listed open PRs conservatively with no close, merge, fix, or label mutations. One linked security-sensitive PR was quarantined with route_security; unrelated inventory items remain non-security and non-mutating.

actions.reason: This PR has useful focused code and author follow-up, but it is not a duplicate, superseded PR, low-signal PR, or safe close target in this inventory shard.

The PR is plausible related work for #51429, but the inventory job does not allow fix or merge actions, and the unresolved proof/review state makes closure or fixed-by-candidate classification unsafe.
This is meaningful work, not a low-signal or duplicate closeout target. Dirty merge state and open linked issues require it to remain on its own maintainer review path.
Draft status and missing behavior proof make this not actionable for closure or merge, but the PR has concrete code/docs/tests and should remain independent of this inventory shard.
The PR is potentially viable but requires the normal maintainer/merge-review path outside this close/comment/label-only inventory plan. It is not duplicate, superseded, or low-signal.
This linked PR touches an allowlist/security-boundary area and must be routed to central OpenClaw security handling, with no ProjectClownfish close, label, comment, merge, or fix action.
